raw_consumer_statement:
In XX/XX/XXXX, I made a purchase totaling {$400.00} from XXXX XXXX using XXXX XXXX  in 4, funded by my Barclays credit card. Instead of issuing a refund, the merchant provided store credit. 

When I recently attempted to use the store credit, I discovered that the company had permanently closed in XX/XX/XXXX without providing any formal notice to customers. Until that point, I had no reason to believe the credit would be unusable. 

As a result, I did not receive the goods or services originally paid for. I attempted to contact the merchant, but their support channels were no longer active. I then filed a dispute with Barclays ; however, the claim was denied based on timing. 

This situation qualifies as services not received, as the merchant failed to provide a usable product or service and is no longer operating. I am requesting that Barclays reconsider this dispute under applicable chargeback protections.
